## Type of change

- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] docs (documentation)
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] style
- [ ] chore

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Matches its specification document
- [ ] Uses only design tokens from `variables.css`
- [ ] No hardcoded colors, spacing, typography, radii, or shadows
- [ ] Works on mobile, tablet, and desktop
- [ ] Visible keyboard focus and semantic HTML
- [ ] No duplicated logic from another component
- [ ] Clean, reusable Blade markup
- [ ] Documented if implementation differs from the spec
